hero.subline: Software Engineer and programming instructor with strong background in problem solving, algorithms, OOP, kids programming platforms, Flutter, and frontend learning tools. Experienced in teaching children and mentoring learners across practical technical tracks.

coach.name: Aassem Alaa Eldeen
coach.role: Software Engineer | Programming Instructor | Problem Solving Mentor
coach.university: Faculty of Engineering, Al-Azhar University — Systems and Computers Department
snapshot: Software Engineer and instructor with experience across programming, problem solving, and technical training
Solved 1200+ problems on Codeforces and participated in ECPC twice
Strong knowledge in algorithms, data structures, OOP, and logical thinking
Teaches kids using platforms such as Scratch, Scratch Jr, App Inventor, PictoBlox, FlutterFlow, web basics, and Godot
Combines technical instruction with multimedia and presentation skills
achievements: More than 1200 solved problems on Codeforces
Head of Problem Solving Track in IEEE Al-Azhar in 2022
Head of Media in AZSENCS student activity in 2024
3 years of experience teaching 1000+ kids at 3C School Academy
2 years of experience teaching 500+ kids at Megaminds Academy
projects: Problem Solving Training — algorithmic thinking, contest preparation, and structured practice guidance
Kids Programming Instruction — teaching programming foundations through Scratch, App Inventor, PictoBlox, and beginner-friendly platforms
Flutter Development Practice — mobile development learning and implementation using Dart and Flutter
Frontend Learning Support — web basics and React-focused learning pathway through practical projects
Multimedia & Print Design Work — banners, flyers, IDs, certificates, and related visual production tasks

items.q: How can I request Aassem for coaching or training?
items.a: Use the WhatsApp button to send your training needs. Coach Academy will coordinate the suitable format, schedule, and learning goals.

items.q: What are Aassem’s main teaching and technical strengths?
items.a: Problem solving, algorithms, OOP, kids programming tools, Flutter, programming fundamentals, and learner-friendly technical instruction.
Yes. He has several years of experience teaching children in academies and mentoring learners in programming and problem solving.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, industry-aligned tech coaching.
